name: com.snivelercode.audio-dispatcher
description: A high-performance, thread-safe audio bridging system for Unity ECS. Features Zero-GC object pooling, 3D spatial audio, AudioMixer support, and Burst-compatible event queuing. Designed for high-frequency sound triggering without main thread stalls.

samples.description: A complete ECS example demonstrating 3D spatial audio, projectile sounds, and mixer integration in a chaotic tank battle simulation.
